review_text: At no point did we see any park staff available to engage with people who want to stay at this park. The park management are quite cranky if you ring them for information in relation to your booking. There is no one to greet you on arrival, just a self check in screen. The same when you depart. Potential campers arrived hoping to ask staff how to complete a booking and/or where their camp site was and there was no one to help them. Quite bizarre and not a friendly way to run a business. If you dont like being a host and helping people, then maybe running a caravan park isnt the right job for this management team....?

Such a peaceful place to stay. been here 7 days and will be here another 7 days.only thing is people not picking up their dog shit.its stated on the park rules.like I said I've been here 7 days and I have 2 large dogs and have picked up their poops everytime.its not hard.i need to pay staff to buy more poo bags cause I've basically used them all myself, so  Dougie or John,please come see me so I can give you some money to buy some more 😊😊

We had a flat well manicured site. Check in/out was via a 24hr kiosk which was easy to use. Camp kitchen was huge, well maintained and welcoming. Beautiful, quiet bushland caravan park. Highly recommend

We had a wonderful 2 night powered stay here, a lovely bushland campsite with a mixture of powered and unpowered sites. Super peaceful and great amenities, pool and games/play area. Doug the site manager was lovely and we will have to return to see the indoor hanging fire pit in full action over winter!
Super close to Raymond island for koala spotting!
Site not suitable under big trees, power box down embankment under tree. Manager refused refund. Very rude, no customer ,service whatsoever ever

We have previously stayed at this caravan park and were due to stay again recently
But unfortunately it wasn't to be due to a serious accident, they were very helpful giving us a full credit to use on another time just their help is worth more than 20 stars

Well where do I start.
Last minute booking, booked for a un powered site then decided when we got there we would like powered. No hassle at all we got a powered site no stress at all.
The owner/ manager congratulations on a awsome little park we wouldn't have opted for a better place to stay. Thank you for the hospitality.
Cheers legend
See you again soon.
Rylie, Nick, Shaun, Lorinda and the kids

Brilliant caravan park out of town nice and quiet extremely clean bathrooms.
Camping kitchen is one of the best I've seen .so much space on the uncovered sites and the powered sites are bowling green flat with manicures grass.
One of those out of the way gems that we will definitely be coming back to .
An amazing stop in the middle of the bush, perfect for disconnecting from the big city

At first glance, the complex looks nice and well maintained, but don’t be fooled by appearances.

The tent camping area (for tents)  is located right next to permanent residential cabins, where people live all year round. This completely destroys any sense of peace or camping atmosphere. One of the residents from house number 57 decided to throw a party and invite friends. They put a TV outside, played loud music, and treated the campsite like their private backyard.

The noise lasted until 1 a.m. When I went over and asked them to turn the music down, they technically did — but then continued loud conversations until 2 a.m., making it impossible to sleep.

What makes this even worse is the fact that there is no staff present in the evenings, so people can do whatever they want without any consequences. No supervision, no quiet hours enforced, no respect for campers.

I strongly advise against staying at this place, especially if you are camping with a tent and expect even basic peace and quiet. If you value rest, sleep, and a proper camping experience — stay far away.

No regards to the management of this campsite.

What a lovely park. Stayed for 5 nights over the Christmas period on a premium site. Couldn’t fault anything. Clean, tidy, great camp kitchen, pool, playground, dog park, tennis court. The manager Doug was helpful and kept an eye on what was going on. We will definitely be back.
Great host, tidy toilets and kitchen areas. Awesome tenants. Definitely stay there in the near future
Good location between lake entrance and Raymond island. Nice place. All is very clean. Big kitchen with a roof. The gerant is very smart !. thank you
Just spent a week there. So peaceful. Lovely sites. Great amenities. The best part is Doug. Couldn't meet a nicer guy. Really helpful and working his butt off ready for the Christmas period.

My wife and I camped here for one night, and it was an incredibly peaceful and romantic experience. The site manager, Doug, was exceptionally kind, welcoming, and truly helpful, he made our stay even better. He personally walked with us around the grounds, showed us different sites, and helped us to choose the perfect quiet spot for a romantic night.

The toilets and kitchen facilities were spotless and very well maintained. We genuinely enjoyed our time here and would highly recommend this place to anyone.

What an awesome gem of a caravan park! One of our favourite in all of Australia!  April, Trent and Doug were all super stars.
We decided to leave our caravan here and do a swag trip to the high country in our 4wd. The weather was great, so we decided to stay a bit longer and just called to extend the caravan booking. Nothing was too much trouble and they were very accommodating.
On our way back we had engine trouble which turned catastrophic and needed a new engine. We organised towing to Sydney for our 4wd and storage of our caravan. Doug went out of his way to help us with towing our caravan (to store it there for until we could collect it 2 months later) and looking after our 4wd until the tow truck turned up the next week as we had to fly out to Sydney.
Doug and the team made a very stressful and upsetting time that much easier. We truly were so grateful for their help and kind consideration.
It was such a quiet and beautiful location, gorgeous bird life and close enough to town to get supplies, spotless amenities and cheap accommodation prices.
I’d recommend Bushlands to anyone wanting to chill and enjoy nature!
Thanks again team, true country legends! 🏆

Really quiet and relaxing bushland park. One of best Camp Kitchens. Grounds and gardens are well looked after. Lots for kids to do. Amenities were kept spotless. Good amount of hot water. 5 x $1 for washing machines and 3 x $1 for 30m dryers. Lovely relaxing stay.

A lovely park to stay at - even if it’s raining! Doug was kind enough to move me to a more open area as I was worried about my car under trees on a stormy evening. Lots of space and wildlife. Amenities block was clean with good shower heads but could use a little refreshing/updating.
Huge sites and great facilities.  Cheap too. Highly recommended.

Such a lovely caravan park! Super clean amenities, really quiet and peaceful, and not busy at all which made it so relaxing. Everything was well looked after and the price was really affordable too. We had a great stay and will definitely be back!
Awesome caravan camping park. Gorgeous scenery, tennis court and epic camp kitchen perfectly maintained by super friendly hosts who went above and beyond. Will be back :))

We had a lovely time here and were welcomed by Doug who was so friendly and helpful in getting us settled in the park. The facilities are so good, with mad kitchen facilities, good laundry and clean bathrooms but the main attraction is the incredible bliss of bushland that surround the park. It was like no other, and cannot wait to come back here in the future. Thanks for a lovely stay.
Awesome caravan park. Amenities were clean and functional. Our family have always enjoyed our stays there. Very pleasant atmosphere.

Just the most incredible, quiet  clean camping area you could possibly ask for !
All amenities here, lots are new. Very well priced, ample room for your van & vehicle parking.
Just do it !
Lovely quiet park , friendly staff &  service , if you want a little getaway ,this is the place ,you won't be disappointed

Great campsite with excellent amenities! Bathrooms are clean and kitchen has everything you need to cook. There’s also a pool, table tennis table, giant chess and a tennis court to add to the fun of the campsite. Checkin was easy. We were able to get to our campsite after hours with ease. Would highly recommend to anyone looking for a caravan park in the area!

Stayed here when we first got our new caravan.

We were escorted to our site, owner even offered some of his own caravan supplies that we had forgotten.

Park was very tidy with plenty of grass for the kids to play.

Good location to explore the local area.
Plenty of room quite great staff

Excellent value campground to base yourself for exploring the area.  Older amenities but everything works properly and is clean. Great camp kitchen area. Swimming pool is a nice bonus!  Washing machine only $3 and dryer $1.40
Beautiful scents from the gum trees. Staff are super friendly and helpful. Thoroughly recommended. Thanks guys!
Wonderful caravan park set in pristine bush with beautiful grass sites. Great facilities. Trent and Doug were most kind and helpful. $29 per night, power and water.  Will definitely visit again ☺️

This was a wonderful campsite. The facilities were fantastic, well cared for and the price is one of the few honest fares left in Australia!

The electricity and water tap towers were almost brand new. There is a playground, gigant chess, ping pong table, tennis court, the communicable kitchen is lovely with fire pit, fireplace, tables etc. all facilities were not super fancy but were all very clean.

The location is about 25 mins inland to Lakes Entrance, so although not right on the coast/beach, we thought it was hand down still well worth it.
We will be coming back to this campsite for sure !
Managers Mick & Tam will be leaving on the 23rd Jan 2025 after 2 yrs. Such a beautiful park and so lucky to meet so many amazing tourists. Onto our next adventure.
Liked: Beautiful park with great amenities
Great little caravan park. Well worth a stay.
Very good park. Great amenities, camp kitchen. Staff very accommodating

A very peaceful park setting.  We phoned in for a very late over night booking and despite the office being closed we were setup on site in no time.  Very friendly and accomodating.
Fantastic camp kitchen, clean toilets and the dog park was loved by our four legged Frenchie.  A great place for them to run about after being restrained.

There is water and electricity in the middle of each camping site. It is very convenient. At the same time, the camping site is covered with grass, with almost no stones and sand. It is pet-friendly. My cat and I love it here.

Very spacious caravan sites, friendly hosts, beautiful setting and good clean facilities.
We stayed mid week outside of peak periods and the park was very quiet. We will definitely be returning for another visit.
Excellent people running the show, location is so peaceful and great for kids & dogs. Camp kitchen is wonderful & well equipped. Didn’t want to leave!

We arrived late to a perfectly detailed map and welcome pack left out for us, great bushlamd setting with fireplace and picnic table on our site. ||Great showers with amazing water pressure and attention to cleanliness||Giant chess board was great fun, fully equipped camp kitchen, an array of wildlife and super friendly staff and park residents! ||If you’re travelling the coast road it’s a great place to stop for a few days and relax! ||We will be back, that’s a promise!
For anyone wanting a nice relaxing weekend away lakes bushland caravan and lifestyle Park is the place to go the owners are really lovely lots to do with the kids can't wait to get back soon

We stayed for two nights in a 2-bedroom cabin at the Lakes Bushland Caravan Park over the King's Birthday long weekend. Check-in was a breeze. The cabin was brand new, very clean, and had all the necessary amenities to make our stay comfortable. The kids enjoyed playing table tennis and spending time in the playground. We also used the gas hot plate in the community kitchen for a BBQ. The internet was a bit patchy due to the location, but we appreciated the downtime. Overall, it was a very pleasant experience, and we would highly recommend it.

Stayed 2 nights, the lights and heater were on when I arrived on a dark rainy evening. The owners greeted me, the cabin was easy to find. Very spacious set up with large living room, well appointed kitchen, washing machine in the bathroom. All beautifully clean, neat and well set out. Very quiet location that is scenic and dog friendly.
Great place. Great powered sites.

What a gem. We don't normally go for caravan parks, but this has large campsites and all you could ask for. Very tidy grounds and lovely owners. Only 20 min drive to lakes entrance. Much nicer to stay here.  Great camp kitchen, pool, ping pong, chess, children's playground.

This place is a little hidden gem off the main rd of Nicholson. At late notice Mick and Tam went above and beyond getting us a site. When we had a few issues levelling out our van Mick was there to help us. Would definitely recommend this place to anyone. With a pool, playground and tennis table for the kids to keep occupied what have you got to loose. Thanks again guys for everything.
Large,  well maintained sites.  Have stayed here over many years and the facilities are great and the owners are focussed on continually improving the experience for their guests.

A wonderful caravan park. We have been to it a few times over the years. So quiet. Animal life is brilliant, love waking up to the magpies and parrots. We rented a cabin. Very good condition, and very clean. For the campers the site has toilets, laundry, camp kitchen. It is in a good central spot for many attractions that Gippsland has to offer. We will be back again.
Beautiful quiet place off the main road.

We were very impressed with information and communication provided by the Management.   The Park has been greatly improved since our last visit in 2019, the sites are very well furnished and the "common use" facilities were very clean and totally adequate.   The site is beautifully located and nicely landscaped.   We intend to return for a longer stay quite soon.
Melville & Brenda Connell.

Good spot to explore the area
Reasonable price, good facilities

What a beautiful  park visiting family  who were staying there very peacful even though park was full  pet friendly great pool   easy to get around  met some luvly people staff friendly all round wonderful  place to stay  family were at a site that didn't work  for dogs & kids asked to be moved  were moved to a great area  very accommodating

Would not recommend to stay there so much. Work is being done They seem to start and stop and not complete what they've started, so if you like to stay in a swamp that full of mud, then go there otherwise, would  recommend Lilo caravan park just up the road?
Great park
Smelly cabin,rude staff......would not recommend

This place is a hidden gem... Mick & Tammy are very friendly hosts, nothing is too much trouble and very thorough maintenence on site.

Extremely quiet park... At night you can't hear any other guests.

The new villa pods are fantastic for 2 ppl and if you're new to camping but want all the comforts, I can't recommend this place more highly! If you want 5 star service & amenities at a bargain price... Look no further!

You won't get this quality, attentive service and price at Discovery Parks, Big 4 or any other park. Let's keep this place a secret and not tell anyone ok? Will definitely be back for more camping adventures and relaxation!
Lovely tranquil bush setting with an amazing bush kitchen. We'll be back.

We have stayed here about 4 different times in the last few months and have been so impressed every time. Mick and Tammy are outstanding! Always helpful and they keep the place beautiful. Toilets and showers are always clean and the other facilities are always on point. Great location, dog off leash area (which is great) and the best value for money around. You can easily pay more than double for a park of this quality. And the park is so bloody quiet! If we ever pass through the area again, we know exactly where we will be staying.
